claim: Approximately 22,500 people are infected with human T-cell lymphotropic virus type 1 in the United Kingdom.

result.claim: Approximately 22,500 people are infected with human T-cell lymphotropic virus type 1 in the United Kingdom.
result.reasoning:
The searches for "human T-cell lymphotropic virus type 1 prevalence United Kingdom 22,500", "HTLV-1 prevalence United Kingdom", and "HTLV-1 prevalence United Kingdom statistics" did not yield any direct evidence to support or refute the claim that approximately 22,500 people are infected with human T-cell lymphotropic virus type 1 in the United Kingdom. The retrieved propositions and chunks discussed HTLV-1 prevalence in other geographical regions (e.g., Poland, Ghana, Japan, sub-Saharan Africa, South America, Caribbean, Middle East, Australo-Melanesia) or focused on the prevalence of other diseases. No specific data or estimates for HTLV-1 infection numbers in the UK were found in the provided knowledge base.
